title: Vibrant Lights
description: Removes block shading from light source blocks only, effectively rendering them full-bright for a more realistic vivid pop.
body:
A simple resource pack that removes the default block shading from _only_ light blocks.

Block shading adds a darkening effect to the sides of blocks to mimic directional light. However, this should not apply for actual sources of light. This pack sets `"shade": false` on all affected models.

Popular packs such as _Shadify_ remove shading from ALL blocks, so this pack would have no effect if combined with them. Vibrant Lights only affects light blocks themselves, ensuring they will always be the brightest element in the scene.

Blocks tweaked:
- Beacon
- Copper Bulb (all lit variations)
- End Rod
- Froglight (all variations)
- Glowstone
- Lantern (all variations)
- Nether Portal texture
- Redstone Lamp (lit)
- Sea Lantern
- Shroomlight
